## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? Keep it focused on one logical change. -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123. Open an issue first for non-trivial changes. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Smart contract change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore / CI

## How has this been tested?

<!-- Describe tests added/run, networks used, and how to verify. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) and are **signed**.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests for my change.
- [ ] All tests, linters, and required CI checks pass locally.
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation.
- [ ] **No secrets, private keys, mnemonics, or `.env` files are included in this PR.**
- [ ] This PR does not contain a security vulnerability fix that should instead go through private disclosure.

## Security considerations

<!-- Does this affect fund flows, signatures, access control, routing, slippage,
     or cross-chain message handling? Describe the security impact, or write "none". -->

## Smart contract changes (delete if N/A)

- [ ] Storage layout is unchanged, or changes are documented and reviewed for upgrade safety.
- [ ] Facet additions/removals and upgrade authorization are explained above.
- [ ] Static analysis (e.g. Slither) was run and findings addressed or justified.
- [ ] Requires **two** maintainer approvals before merge.
